news.summary: In Miami on June 12, 2025, a company named Blockticity introduced a new custom Avalanche Layer 1 network through AvaCloud. This development is significant as it involves transferring 45,000 Certificates of Authenticity (COAs) to the platform. Blockticity specializes in securing global trade documents using blockchain technology and artificial intelligence. The shift to this new network is a milestone in enhancing trade infrastructure and ensuring the security of important documents.
news.headline: Blockticity launches new Avalanche-powered L1 network to authenticate $1.2B+ global trade, migrating 45,000 COAs.

news.summary: A Swiss-based company, ADC Therapeutics SA, which is a prominent player in the field of antibody drug conjugates (ADCs), disclosed on June 12, 2025, that it has finalized securities purchase agreements for the sale of its equity. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ADCT, is recognized as a global leader in this sector.
news.headline: ADC Therapeutics secures $100M in private placement, extending cash runway to 2028. Leader in ADCs.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on June 12, 2025, CNX Resources Corporation (NYSE: CNX) disclosed the promotion of Alan Shepard to President alongside his existing role as Chief Financial Officer. This move aims to capitalize on the potential for the CNX team to further enhance per-share value.
news.headline: CNX Resources promotes Alan Shepard to President alongside CFO role; aims to create per-share value.

news.summary: The acquisition provides an opportunity for shareholders of TELUS Digital to gain liquidity at an attractive value. This move will also strengthen TELUS Digital's capacity to adapt efficiently to evolving market trends. Increasing operational collaboration between TELUS and TELUS Digital aims to boost advancements in AI and SaaS, presenting a strategic transformation for both entities.
news.headline: TELUS has submitted a non-binding offer to acquire full ownership of TELUS Digital, providing liquidity and boosting AI/SaaS capabilities.

news.summary: The company has updated its earnings per share projections, with FY25 non-GAAP diluted EPS guidance raised to $8.15 to $8.20. For FY26, they have provided an initial estimate of $9.10 to $9.30, indicating a 13% growth rate at the midpoints. Additionally, they have reaffirmed their long-term goal of achieving a 12% to 14% compound annual growth rate for non-GAAP diluted EPS from FY26 to FY28. These adjustments reflect the company's positive outlook and commitment to driving financial performance in the coming years.
news.headline: Cardinal Health forecasts FY26 non-GAAP diluted EPS between $9.10 to $9.30, reflecting 13% growth and long-term 12-14% CAGR.

news.summary: In Mainz and Tübingen, Germany, on June 12, 2025, BioNTech SE (Nasdaq: BNTX) and CureVac N.V. (Nasdaq: CVAC) have announced a definitive Purchase Agreement. BioNTech plans to acquire all shares of CureVac, an innovative biotech company specializing in oncology and infectious disease treatments using mRNA technology. This all-stock deal merges the two German-based companies, leveraging BioNTech's leadership in the global mRNA sector. This strategic move aims to enhance research and development capabilities in the face of health challenges, consolidating expertise and resources in the field.
news.headline: BioNTech to acquire CureVac in stock deal, focused on mRNA medicines in oncology, infectious diseases, consolidating German-based biotech companies.

news.summary: As 93% of the total Bitcoin supply has already been mined, there is a growing competition for the remaining coins. This phenomenon is significantly affecting the scarcity of Bitcoin, the rewards for mining activities, and the trajectory of the network going forward.
news.headline: 93% of Bitcoin already mined sparks race for remaining coins, affecting scarcity, rewards, and network's future.

news.summary: In Kfar Saba, Israel, on June 12, 2025, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO), an aerospace firm specializing in safety systems for commercial unmanned aerial systems and counter UAS systems, disclosed its involvement in recent live demonstrations and strategic collaborations in the United States. These initiatives highlight the company's dedication to progressing drone technologies in the U.S., improving public safety, and aligning with U.S. national security objectives.
news.headline: ParaZero Technologies (Nasdaq: PRZO) showcases innovative drone safety solutions in U.S. demo, prioritizing public safety and national security.

news.summary: In Syria, Binance has officially launched a complete access platform, enabling citizens to engage in trading of a minimum of 300 tokens. This selection includes popular options such as Bitcoin, XRP, and Toncoin among others.
news.headline: Binance expands to Syria with over 300 tokens available after US lifts sanctions. Bitcoin, XRP, Toncoin.

news.summary: Chimera Investment Corporation (NYSE: CIM) revealed its acquisition of HomeXpress Mortgage Corp. on June 11, 2025. The deal was struck with certain affiliates of Seer Capital Management’s credit fund business and management sellers. HomeXpress, a top originator, specializes in consumer non-QM, investor business purpose, and other non-Agency mortgage loan products. The acquisition marks a significant move for Chimera in expanding its portfolio and market presence.
news.headline: Chimera Investment Corp (CIM) to acquire HomeXpress Mortgage. Deal reached on June 11, 2025 from Seer Capital Management affiliates.

news.summary: In Hong Kong on June 12, 2025, Metalpha Technology Holding Limited (Nasdaq: MATH), a prominent wealth management company focusing on digital assets, revealed the achievement of finalizing the LSQ Investment Fund SPC – Next Generation Fund I SP.
news.headline: Metalpha's Next Generation Fund concludes with exceptional performance; LSQ Investment Fund SP receives positive outcome. (Tweet length)

news.summary: A study found that combining ZYNLONTA® with glofitamab (COLUMVI®) resulted in significant benefits for patients with r/r DLBCL, with an overall response rate (ORR) of 93.3% and a complete response (CR) rate of 86.7% among 30 patients evaluated for efficacy. Of the 26 patients who achieved CR, 25 remained in the study.
news.headline: ADC Therapeutics presents data at EHA 2025 on ZYNLONTA® + glofitamab in r/r DLBCL: 93.3% ORR and 86.7% CR rate in 30 patients.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $1.14 per common share, marking a 1.8% rise from the previous dividend of $1.12. The dividend will be paid out on September 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of that date.
news.headline: Target Corp raises quarterly dividend by 1.8% to $1.14 per share from $1.12. Payable on Sept. 1, 2025 to shareholders

news.summary: Etsy, Inc. based in Brooklyn, N.Y., disclosed on June 12, 2025, that they have priced $650 million in aggregate principal amount of 1.00% bonds. The company, listed as ETSY on Nasdaq, runs online marketplaces connecting numerous creative buyers and sellers globally.
news.headline: Etsy priced $650M in convertible senior notes offering. The notes have a 1.00% interest rate.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in Medford, Oregon, Emanuel M. Katten, a foundational member of AIRA's precursor group, was honored for his contributions to the organization. Katten played a key role in creating AIRA's CIRA certification program and various other professional initiatives. The news did not disclose specific numbers or figures related to Katten's impact.
news.headline: Keith J. Shapiro receives Emanuel M. Katten Founders Award from AIRA for contributions to the association; ceremony held in Medford, Ore.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report was released regarding the Industrial Rubber Market. This report focuses on various applications of industrial rubber, including Automotive, Building & Construction, Industrial Manufacturing, Polymer Modification, Wire & Cable, and Electrical & Electronics. The study covers different types of rubber products, end-use product processing methods, and regional analysis. Important sectors of the market mentioned in the report include Automotive, Building & Construction, Industrial Manufacturing, Polymer Modification, Wire & Cable, and Electrical & Electronics. The research provides insights into market trends, product variations, and regional distribution, catering to a wide range of industries.
news.headline: Industrial Rubber Market projected to reach $14.90 billion by 2030, according to MarketsandMarkets™ report.

news.summary: For those seeking weekend entertainment, lovers of romance novels are in for a "heart-racing, enthusiast-inducing, fairy-tale" treat. In Atlantic City, N.J., on June 12, 2025, an event not to be missed awaits. Calling all fans of romance literature, make sure to mark your calendars as this experience promises the ultimate happily-ever-after. This gathering offers the best beach reads of the summer, providing enthusiasts with an unforgettable time.
news.headline: Romance authors gather in Atlantic City on June 13-15 for a steamy book signing event. Exciting weekend for romance book lovers!

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Teleflex Incorporated shared results from a recent study on the effectiveness of Arrow™ Chlorhexidine-Impregnated Central Venous Catheters (CVCs). The multinational study involved over 6,670 patients from 12 Intensive Care Units within eight hospitals spanning across India, Malaysia, Papua New Guinea, Colombia, Egypt, and Turkey. Teleflex is renowned for its medical technologies and is listed on the NYSE under TFX.
news.headline: Study by Teleflex Inc showed Arrow™ Chlorhexidine-Impregnated CVCs led to lower infection rates among ICU patients. 6,670 patients in 12 ICUs across 6 countries were included.

news.summary: A recent report by BCG has revealed that India possesses 16% of the global AI talent pool, ranking second only to the United States. This emphasizes the significant role India plays in the AI sector, showcasing its growing prominence in the field worldwide.
news.headline: India's AI market to reach $17B by 2027, with 16% of global AI talent. BCG report highlights growing sector.

Tether Investments S.A. de C.V. (“Tether Investments”), an affiliate of the Tether Group, has announced the acquisition of a substantial stake in Elemental Altus Royalties Corp. (“Elemental”), a publicly listed gold-focused royalty company based in Canada.

news.summary: In a significant development at NVIDIA's GTC conference in Paris on June 12, 2025, CEO Jensen Huang acknowledged Nebul, a company based in the Netherlands, for its pioneering role in advancing European AI cloud services. The recognition from Huang, a key figure in the tech industry, highlights Nebul's growing prominence as an innovative force in the sector. This acknowledgment by Huang at the respected conference underscores Nebul's position as a standout player in the European AI cloud market.
news.headline: NVIDIA CEO mentions Dutch AI provider Nebul at GTC Paris, putting the Netherlands on the map as a major European sovereign cloud player.

news.summary: Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN) celebrated the dedication of two stations on the Foothill Gold Line light rail segment in Southern California's San Gabriel Valley. The 9.1-mile segment, completed in January, has been handed over to the Los Angeles County Metropolitan Transportation Authority (Metro) for final testing and training. Passenger service is expected to commence later this year. The extension will become part of the 48.5-mile Metro A Line system, making it the longest light rail line in the country, connecting Long Beach and Pomona.
news.headline: Parsons celebrates 9.1-mile light rail segment completion; part of 48.5-mile Metro A Line; passenger service soon.
